I’m starting the file edits now. I’m converting the shared provider to a typed client component, building the full `app` tree, then I’ll remove `pages` and run a build to catch any App Router API mismatches.

The main structure is in place. I’m tightening the App Router details now: replacing the old document font-loading pattern with `next/font`, fixing invalid button-in-link markup, and then I’ll delete `pages` and run the build.
I’m removing the old Pages Router tree now so the project only resolves through `app`. After that I’ll run `next build` and fix whatever the compiler flags.

text:
Migrated the project fully to the App Router and removed `pages` entirely. The new route tree lives under [app](/home/user/workspace/app), with `layout.tsx` replacing `_app` and `_document`, [app/error.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/error.tsx) replacing the old `_error` pattern, [app/not-found.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/not-found.tsx) replacing `404.js`, and typed route handlers under [app/api/posts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts). I also converted the shared provider to a typed client component in [components/AppProvider.tsx](/home/user/workspace/components/AppProvider.tsx), added typed post-fetching helpers in [lib/posts.ts](/home/user/workspace/lib/posts.ts), and switched the old document font setup to `next/font` in [app/layout.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/layout.tsx).

The old Pages Router APIs were replaced with App Router patterns:
`getServerSideProps` -> server component plus `headers()` in [app/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx:1)
`getStaticProps` -> server components with `revalidate`
`getStaticPaths` -> `generateStaticParams` in [app/blog/[id]/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/[id]/page.tsx:1)
`next/router` -> `next/navigation` or `Link`
API handlers -> `NextResponse` route handlers

Verification: `npm run build` completed successfully. Next also updated [tsconfig.json](/home/user/workspace/tsconfig.json) to include `.next/dev/types/**/*.ts` during the build.
